layout: Centered code block containing the YAML configuration, with a copy button overlaid top-right. No Card wrapper; no title; no filter.

pre_style.fontFamily_concern: INCONSISTENCY: pre uses bare 'monospace' keyword — no explicit stack (e.g., 'ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace'). Browsers render different fonts; not a design-system-grade stack.

missing_wrappers.no_card: Unlike /status, /tsdb-status, /flags — /config does NOT wrap its content in a Card. The pre block sits directly in the page body.
missing_wrappers.no_title: No 'Configuration' title rendered inside the content — the page title comes only from the header breadcrumb.
